target.title: test(agents): use neutral tool schema fixtures
target.body:
## Summary

- Replaces real-looking reported tool-schema fixture names with neutral `fuzzplugin` names across existing agent, doctor, Gateway protocol, MCP, compaction, and Codex dynamic-tool tests.
- Keeps the current runtime and doctor behavior unchanged; this is a test-fixture scrub so follow-up hardening PRs do not carry report-specific lore.

## Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/agents-models-skills.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-tools.materialize.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/commands/doctor/repair-sequencing.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/active-tool-schema-warnings.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/preview-warnings.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/agents-models-skills.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-runtime.test.ts src/agents/agent-bundle-mcp-tools.materialize.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tools-effective-inventory.test.ts src/commands/doctor/repair-sequencing.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/active-tool-schema-warnings.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/preview-warnings.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (6 routed shards / 293 tests)
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- Touched-file scrub for the reported plugin/tool names plus private paths/network literals returned no matches.

Behavior addressed: test fixtures no longer use the real-looking plugin/tool names from the reported unsupported-schema crash.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw Codex worktree, routed Vitest configs through `scripts/run-vitest.mjs`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run ... --reporter=verbose` over the 14 touched test files.

Evidence after fix: 6 routed Vitest shards passed, covering 293 tests; oxfmt, diff check, touched-file scrub, and autoreview were clean.

Observed result after fix: existing runtime/doctor/quarantine tests still pass while using neutral `fuzzplugin` fixtures.

What was not tested: `pnpm check:changed` in Blacksmith Testbox was not run because local Blacksmith CLI auth is missing (`blacksmith auth login` required). No runtime behavior changed in this PR.
target.author: vincentkoc
